description: spanish residential electricity invoice (factura de electricidad) with a billing-summary charge breakdown (resumen de facturacion) that reconciles to the total a pagar. extract values exactly as printed; convert decimal commas to numeric dots (80,95 -> 80.95).

numeroFactura.description: the invoice number as printed under numero de factura.

cups.description: the supply point identification code (CUPS) exactly as printed, including spaces.

periodoFacturacionStart.description: start date of the billing period (periodo de facturacion) in YYYY-MM-DD format.

periodoFacturacionEnd.description: end date of the billing period (periodo de facturacion) in YYYY-MM-DD format.

consumoKwh.description: total metered electricity consumption in kWh for the period.

charges.description: the resumen de facturacion charge lines, each a spanish charge label and its amount in euros. exclude the total/summary row (total a pagar).

description.description: the spanish charge label exactly as printed on the line.

amount.description: the charge amount in euros as a number, decimal comma converted to dot, no currency symbol.

baseImponible.description: the taxable base (importe total before IVA) in euros as a number.

iva.description: the IVA (VAT) amount in euros as a number.

totalAPagar.description: the total amount due (total a pagar) in euros as a number, equal to the sum of the charge lines.
